rules._doc: docsai query strings vary between runs; proxy to the real `uip docsai ask` on the host. Dispatcher caches each unique query under responses/_cache/ for in-run reuse.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched by `rules` returns an empty array. Lets the agent explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.
